commands.review_summary:
The PR makes implicit OpenAI-to-Codex harness selection fall back to PI when no Codex harness is registered, adds focused harness-selection coverage, and adds a changelog line.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main resolves official OpenAI defaults to implicit `codex` and then throws when that harness is not registered. The linked issue supplies the live `/v1/chat/completions` failure, but I did not rerun the container.
